# InyaTech

InyaTech is a premium web development agency specializing in building modern, fast, and conversion-focused business websites and applications.

## Key Resources

- [Home](https://inyatech.com/) - Main landing page showcasing our design standards, client trust elements, and core capabilities.
- [Services](https://inyatech.com/services) - Comprehensive list of software development, UI/UX, and technology integration services.
- [Portfolio](https://inyatech.com/portfolio) - Showcase of premium web designs, interactive mockups, and client case studies.
- [About Us](https://inyatech.com/about) - Agency background, modern tech stack alignment, and developer profile.
- [Contact](https://inyatech.com/contact) - Contact form and direct communication channels.
